prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for phenol were calculated using Density Functional Theory (DFT) with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier `standard`, density-fit) in PySCF. The calculation was performed in the gas phase with a charge of 0 and multiplicity of 1. The geometry was sourced from the user-supplied file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz`. SCF converged.

The Fukui f+ indices (electrophilic attack) for each atom are:
- Atom 1 (O): -0.99513677
- Atom 2 (C): 0.39933189
- Atom 3 (C): 2.1028319
- Atom 4 (C): 1.6196806
- Atom 5 (C): -0.34200646
- Atom 6 (C): -0.28910827
- Atom 7 (C): 1.3079753
- Atom 8 (H): -0.73391778
- Atom 9 (H): -0.27465615
- Atom 10 (H): -0.91706058
- Atom 11 (H): -0.62991625
- Atom 12 (H): -0.29591676
- Atom 13 (H): 0.047899334

The Fukui f- indices (nucleophilic attack) for each atom are:
- Atom 1 (O): 0.16201477
- Atom 2 (C): 0.048772551
- Atom 3 (C): 0.070972379
- Atom 4 (C): 0.070498539
- Atom 5 (C): 0.026704972
- Atom 6 (C): 0.020949414
- Atom 7 (C): 0.12351549
- Atom 8 (H): 0.082321145
- Atom 9 (H): 0.088147788
- Atom 10 (H): 0.081105985
- Atom 11 (H): 0.080487046
- Atom 12 (H): 0.09349577
- Atom 13 (H): 0.051014152

The most electrophilic site is Atom 3 (Carbon) with an f+ value of 2.1028319.
The most nucleophilic site is Atom 1 (Oxygen) with an f- value of 0.16201477.
A plot visualizing the Fukui indices is available at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/argo_gemini-2.5-flash/20260703-200607_phenol_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`.
